title: cotyledon libanotica var. glabra
intro: Cotyledon libanotica var. glabra, also known as a smooth Lebanese aloe, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the Asphodelaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress, improving skin health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the smooth Lebanese aloe is often used in the form of ointments, creams, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
